chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: رِوَايَةِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يَنْزِعُ اَلْحَلَمَةَ عَنِ اَلْبَعِيرِ فَقَالَ «لاَ هِيَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلْقَمْلَةِ مِنْ جَسَدِكَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2721 - In the narration of Ali ibn Abi Hamzah from Abu Basir, he said: I asked him about a person in the state of ihram removing lice from a camel.
Imam (as) said: "No, it is like the lice from your own body."
